name: io.github.cafetechne/antigravity-link
title: Antigravity Link
description: MCP server and OpenAPI-backed mobile companion for controlling Antigravity IDE sessions

environmentVariables.description: Base URL for the local Antigravity Link bridge server
environmentVariables.name: AG_BRIDGE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Auth token from the Antigravity Link QR URL
environmentVariables.name: AG_BRIDGE_TOKEN
